red_test.reason: Arena CI and fixture behavior is audited through existing Go tests without changing benchmark or workflow code

targeted_test.output: Arena internal benchmark and CLI suites passed.

integration_test.output: Arena vet and CLI build passed; generated local build artifact was removed immediately.

status_test.output: Workflow covers pull_request and main push on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with go test, go vet, and go build; permissions are contents: read.

next_test.command: source inspection of CompareFixture and fixture-mode runner
next_test.output: Fixture runner refuses non-fixture competitors and comparison uses deterministic fixture score inputs; live provider evaluation remains out of scope.

objective: Coordinate ao-arena Arena hosted CI workflow parity through a bounded Atlas compatibility evidence node with no promotion.
